description: catwalk thong style sandals with stiletto heels for the ethnic diva. The earthy tones in this pair look best with Indian ethnic fusion wear. Wear this with an edgy kurta from AND, a rugged leather belt, skinny jeans and street jewellery, or with a heavily embellished salwar kameez or sari.Heel: 3"UpperMidfoot strap and toe separator with stone and bead workSoft, padded footbed with embossed brandingStiletto style heelOutsoleTPR outsole with raised heel that has terraced groovesSandal careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
